diagrams.title: 1D Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows a 1D array with 6 elements stored in contiguous memory locations with indices 0-5
elements: Each element directly accessible by index
diagrams.purpose: Understanding contiguous memory allocation and random access in arrays

diagrams.title: Row Major vs Column Major 2D Array
diagrams.description: Comparison of how a 3×3 matrix is stored in row-major versus column-major order
elements: Visual showing memory blocks filled in order
diagrams.purpose: Understanding multidimensional array storage in linear memory

diagrams.title: Dynamic Array Resizing Process
diagrams.description: Shows how a dynamic array grows: initial size 4, doubles to 8, then to 16 when full
elements: Stage 2: adding 5 causes resize, new array[8] created
Elements copied from old to new location
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how dynamic arrays handle growth and memory management

diagrams.title: Sparse Matrix Compression
diagrams.description: Shows a 5×5 sparse matrix with only 4 non-zero elements and its compressed representation
elements: Memory savings from 25 integers to 12 integers (row,col,value for each)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding efficient storage of sparse data structures
